title: AAG Finding v1
description: AAG SCP checker が emit する Finding の共通契約。各 Finding は (a) detected structural drift = `valid-finding` または (b) verified absence of drift = `verified-zero` (ADR-SCP-016 D3 整合) を articulate する。Wave 1 / Phase 1 sub-PR 1 で landing。base fields は ADR-SCP-013 (13 fields)、result discriminator + verified-zero specific fields は ADR-SCP-016 D3。consumer = §A1 + §A2 全 checker (Wave 1〜3)、producer = AAG SCP CLI / governance runner (`tools/governance/run-scp-checker.ts` 等)。
$comment: format 選定根拠: AAG repo 既存 8 schemas (aag-parameters / aag-response / detector-result / aag-size-statistics / task-capsule etc.) と同 family = draft-07、Ajv 既定 dialect。設計判断 (ADR-SCP-016 D3 整合): result discriminator は oneOf + const pattern (ADR-SCP-016 推奨案 A、明示的 + IDE 補完性能高、共通 fields 重複は top-level properties で解決)。severity は 3 値 (info / warn / error) で start (推奨案 B、`block` は不可侵原則 8 と整合せず Wave 3 以降に追加判断、本 schema additive 拡張時に v2 で enum 追加)。suggestedDisposition は Reading Pass 6 + Tree Contract 用 1 = 7 値。confidence は enum 3 値 (high / medium / low、numeric は false-positive 計算で意味なし、運用負荷小)。後続 v2 で severity 拡張 / disposition 追加 / confidence numeric 化が必要なら additive minor (= aag delta=+0.1)。

$comment.description: free-form documentation comment、consumer は参照しない (= JSON Schema $comment と同 idiom)。

schemaVersion.description: schema version anchor。本 schema = `aag-finding-v1`。後続 v2 (= severity 拡張 / disposition 追加 / confidence numeric 化) で minor バージョン bump 予定 (= versionImpact aag delta=+0.1 minor)。

id.description: Finding unique identifier。AAG SCP は prefix `FND-SCP-` を使用 (Document ID `DOC-` と区別、grep 容易)。例: `FND-SCP-WAVE1-TREE-001` / `FND-SCP-WAVE1-VERIFIED-ZERO-002`。

phase.description: Wave / Phase context where this Finding was emitted。例: 'Wave 1 / Phase 1' / 'Wave 1 / Phase 3' / 'Wave 2 / Phase 5'。本 program archive 後は phase context が消失するため、history view (= recent-changes.generated.md) では参照のみ。

detectedBy.description: Checker identifier that emitted this Finding。例: 'check-yaml-machine-truth' / 'check-tree' / 'scp-check-app-untouched' / 'scp-check-hard-gate-surface'。§A1 = `tools/governance/check-*.ts`、§A2 = `aag/scp-checkers/<id>.yaml` の id 値を使用。

detectedAt.description: Commit SHA at which the Finding was emitted (reproducibility 用)。short SHA (7 chars) または full SHA (40 chars) 許可。

status.description: Triage status。Wave 1 advisory only 期間中は `open` / `acknowledged` のみ運用、`fixed` / `wontfix` / `false-positive` は Wave 2+ Reading Pass / disposition 確定時に articulate。

result.description: Discriminator (ADR-SCP-016 D3)。`valid-finding` = detected structural drift。`verified-zero` = scoped scan confirmed no drift (= 既存 governance が十分強い場合でも Wave 1 を無価値扱いにしないための articulation 形式、AAG 形式の Finding/Report で証明)。

severity.description: Severity (valid-finding case のみ articulate、verified-zero では未使用)。Wave 1 advisory only。`block` severity は不可侵原則 8 (Wave 1 milestone 前 hard gate 禁止) と整合しないため除外、Wave 3+ user 判断で v2 拡張候補。

subject.description: Subject of the violation (valid-finding case のみ)。file path / directory / document ID / schema field 等の articulation。例: 'app/src/foo/bar.ts' / 'docs/contracts/aag/' / 'DOC-CALC-001' / 'aag-finding.schema.json#/properties/result'。

rule.description: Rule reference (valid-finding case のみ)。違反根拠の articulation。例: 'ADR-SCP-001' / 'AAG-SCP-GUIDANCE-007' / '不可侵原則 4' / 'projectization §4 nonGoal'。

problem.description: What went wrong (valid-finding case のみ、1〜2 sentences)。

expected.description: What should be the case instead (valid-finding case のみ、1〜2 sentences)。AI / human が次に取るべき action の articulate。

suggestedDisposition.description: Suggested disposition (valid-finding case のみ)。Reading Pass 6 categories (ADR-SCP-011: keep-and-contract / split / move / archive / generated-register / needs-triage) + `unmanaged-promote` (Tree Contract 専用、unmanaged-but-tolerated → managed への user 判断 promotion)。

confidence.description: Detection confidence (valid-finding case のみ)。`high` = mechanically deterministic detection (例: git diff name-only patterns / JSON schema validation)。`medium` = heuristic detection (例: Markdown heading pattern matching)。`low` = high false-positive risk = require human review before action。

falsePositiveAllowed.description: Whether this Finding is allowed to be false-positive (= soft Finding, advisory) (valid-finding case のみ)。Wave 1 advisory only 期間中は全 Finding が `falsePositiveAllowed = true` で運用、Wave 3+ hard gate 化判断時に false-positive 0 を要求する Finding が articulate される。

scope.description: Scope that was scanned (verified-zero case のみ articulate)。例: 'managed zone 4 件 = top-level tree + projects/ + references/04-tracking/ + docs/contracts/' / 'top-level tree 8 entries'。

evidence.description: Evidence of zero drift (verified-zero case のみ articulate)。

scannedFiles.description: Count of files / paths / entries scanned。

drift.description: Drift count (verified-zero では必ず 0、schema レベルで articulate)。

scannedAt.description: Commit SHA at which scan was performed。

rationale.description: Why this verified-zero Finding has value (verified-zero case のみ articulate)。例: '対象範囲を完全に走査し、structural drift が存在しないことを機械的に確認' / '既存 governance による carry を AAG 形式で articulate し、Wave 1 evidence として保存'。

oneOf.title: valid-finding case (detected structural drift)
oneOf.description: structural drift が検出された Finding。severity / subject / rule / problem / expected / suggestedDisposition / confidence / falsePositiveAllowed が必須。

oneOf.title: verified-zero case (no drift detected in scoped scan)
oneOf.description: 対象範囲に structural drift がないことを scoped scan で証明した Finding (ADR-SCP-016 D3)。scope / evidence / rationale が必須。
